    V

    VacationMode - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    Represents an active vacation-mode configuration for a user (FR-21).
    VacationMode() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.VacationMode
    Default constructor required by JPA.
    VacationModeMapper - Klasse in at.jku.se.mapper
    Maps VacationMode entities to response DTOs.
    VacationModeRepository - Klasse in at.jku.se.repository
    Repository for VacationMode entities.
    VacationModeRepository() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.repository.VacationModeRepository
    Default constructor required by CDI.
    VacationModeRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for activating or updating vacation mode (FR-21).
    VacationModeRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.VacationModeRequest
    Default constructor for deserialization frameworks.
    VacationModeResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for vacation mode (FR-21).
    VacationModeResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.VacationModeResource
    Default constructor required by CDI.
    VacationModeResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for a vacation mode configuration.
    VacationModeResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.VacationModeResponse
    Default constructor for serialization frameworks.

    Gibt die Enum-Konstante dieser Klasse mit dem angegebenen Namen zurück.
